records.ety: [F. quadrille, n. fem., fr. Sp. cuadrilla meeting of four or more persons or It. quadriglia a band of soldiers, a sort of dance; dim. fr. L. quadra a square, fr. quattuor four. See Quadrate.]

defs: A dance having five figures, in common time, four couples of dancers being in each set.
The appropriate music for a quadrille.

records.ety: [F. quadrille, n. masc., cf. It. quadriglio; or perhaps from the Spanish. See Quadrille a dance.]

defs: A game played by four persons with forty cards, being the remainder of an ordinary pack after the tens, nines, and eights are discarded.
